entry.title: Re: Costing sheet in networks and network activities
entry.content: Hi Ken, thank you for your help. However, in the costing variant I can only maintain one costing sheet. I have multiple costing sheets for the same network type. Is there a way the costing sheet can be copied from the WBS, or something similar? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Unable to suppress group footer section based on cond...
entry.content:
It sounds like, currently, you have all 4 subreports placed in Group Footer 1 (GF1).
Right-click GF1 and select 'Insert Section Below'. That would result in GF1a and GF1b sections. Repeat twice more to get GF1c and GF1d as well.

Place 1st subreport in GF1a, 2nd subreport in GF1b, etc.

Use the dynamic 'Suppress' expression for each of these sections to Suppress the section when the current group value (what you call 'Header') does not match the one for that subreport.

For example, in the Suppress expression for GF1a, have something like:
---------------------------
{Header} <> "Header 1"
---------------------------

entry.title: Re: Assign multiple solution processes to one test case?
entry.content:
Hi, Ebba,
I just tried to create a Test Case to check this and only one Solution Process can be assigned to the Test Case.  Also checked after test case is saved whether I could add another and it seems limited to a single Solution Process.

Perhaps development could find some way to accommodate such a request:  

If you have a request for a feature/function that is not presently available, you can submit it at:

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam HANA ML In Mannheim 2024-06 Recap
entry.content: big thanks to our host @Jörg_Brandeis  and @Vitaliy-R for this great SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database #HANA Machine Learning SAP CodeJam in Mannheim

entry.title: Re: Quick Start guide for PLM system integration 3.0 Implementation
entry.content:
Hi Amit

I see you note that PLMSI supports MTS and configure to order

Does it support parameter effectivity (example model / serial number effectivity)?

entry.title: Re: How to enable PDF Preview in smart form print preview
entry.content:
Yes, it's not from Spool, 

Document -> issue output-> select output-> click on print preview.

entry.title: Value in LC equal zero when selecting the special stock and movement type 601 in transaction MB51
entry.content:
Dear ALL, 

In MB51 report, for dropshipment purchase orders and deliveries, the outbound value of materials shows as zero. Ideally, it should reflect the purchase price. When we perform goods receipt (GR) for dropshipment purchase orders, Nessie places the stock under special stock  with the correct purchase price.
 
Please Why does the quantity in LC equal zero when selecting the special stock ?

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Hi!

I have a question, we currently have several Tenants (cloud) of Microsoft Teams, one for each of the businesses we have (currently 8 )

Is it possible to connect those 8 Microsoft Teams tenants to SSFF Productivo?

Thanks

María

entry.title: Re: How to do Batch call in RAP Odata with CHANGE_SET ena...
entry.content: Thank you @AbhishekSharma,

entry.title: JSON model loading after the view is rendered, thus leaving the view blank
entry.content: I am facing a problem in sapui5 where my view is loading before the model maintained in the manifest.json is pulling data from the given json file and because of this the view is rendering blank. I have to refresh the page manually for view to wait for model to load before the view is rendered. I have used attachRequestCompleted function on the model to get model data but sometimes while navigating from one view to another I am facing this issue. I have also maintained preload: true for model in manifest. I can see the json file loading in the network tab. How can I solve this issue, does anyone have any idea?

entry.title: New Learning experience for mobile
entry.content: We have enabled the new ILX for learning in our testing environment. However, the mobile app does not reflect the new ILX mobile - is there something we are missing to get this turned on?

entry.title: $100 Off Temu Promo Code {acr897367} or {frg227060} First Order June 2024
entry.content:
Use $100 off Temu coupon code using the code {acr897367} or {frg227060} Working In 14 Countries To Recieve your discount coupon bundle. This Temu $100 Off code is specifically for new customers and can be redeemed to receive a $100 discount on your purchase.

The error "HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED" in your GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud is caused by the maximum number of HTTP client connections being exceeded. This occurs when multiple HTTP requests are generated for an instance and cannot be handled. To resolve this issue, you can try the following:

Reduce the Number of HTTP Requests:
Check if there are any unnecessary HTTP requests being generated in your application. Try to minimize the number of requests by optimizing your code or using more efficient methods.
Increase the Maximum Number of Connections:
You can increase the maximum number of HTTP client connections by configuring the max_connections parameter in your SAP system. However, be cautious when doing so, as it may impact system performance.

entry.title: Re: How to do Batch call in RAP Odata with CHANGE_SET ena...
entry.content: @AbhishekSharma, But I need this with create operation, change operation, and delete operation of the entities, not to specific action of the Business Object.

entry.title: If you are archiving a PO and get the error "Invoiced quantity not the same as GR quantity"?
entry.content: If you are archiving a PO and get the error "Invoiced quantity not the same as GR quantity" what do you do with MR11 to get past the error message?  All supporting documents GRs and IRs have been archived.

This occurs when multiple HTTP requests are generated for an instance and cannot be handled. To resolve this issue, you can try the following:

Reduce the Number of HTTP Requests:
Check if there are any unnecessary HTTP requests being generated in your application. Try to minimize the number of requests by optimizing your code or using more efficient methods.
Increase the Maximum Number of Connections:
You can increase the maximum number of HTTP client connections by configuring the max_connections parameter in your SAP system. However, be cautious when doing so, as it may impact system performance.

The error "HTTP_MAX_CONN_EXCEEDED" in your GSTR1 RAP application in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud is caused by the maximum number of HTTP client connections being exceeded. This occurs when multiple HTTP requests are generated for an instance and cannot be handled. To resolve this issue, you can try the following:

Reduce the Number of HTTP Requests:
Check if there are any unnecessary HTTP requests being generated in your application. Try to minimize the number of requests by optimizing your code or using more efficient methods.
Increase the Maximum Number of Connections:
You can increase the maximum number of HTTP client connections by configuring the max_connections parameter in your SAP system. However, be cautious when doing so, as it may impact system performance.

entry.title: Vector Data Visualization and Comparision between TensorBoard and HANA DB
entry.content:
Objective

With the advent of Machine Learning and Natural Language Processing, word embeddings have become a fundamental tool. The first step of the transformer architecture is to tokenize the words and represent them as vectors in a high-dimensional space, which is accomplished by the embedding layer.

I was curious to visualize the vector representation and explore whether we could train a vector on a small dataset rather than using a large pre-trained model. Additionally, I want to explore the SAP HANA vector engine and use TensorBoard to visualize my own dataset. After multiple attempts, I found a way to satisfy my curiosity by combining the power of the SAP HANA vector engine and TensorBoard for visualizing my own dataset.

In this blog post, we will explore how to store vector data in SAP HANA DB, visualize the vectors using TensorBoard, and compare the Cosine similarity and Euclidean distances of a word in SAP HANA DB and TensorBoard.

Steps:

  1. Read content from file and generate word embeddings using Word2Vec
  2. Store the embeddings in HANA DB
  3. Visualize the embeddings in TensorBoard projector
  4. Compare the cosine and Euclidean distances of word vectors between HANA DB and TensorBoard

HANA Vector Engine:

To know about HANA Vector Engine refer these blogs,

  • First steps using the Hana Vector Engine with SAP GEN AI by @AronMac 
  • Practical introduction to SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine by @TiagoAlmeida 

Let's first create a database table WORD_EMBEDDINGS with a vector of dimension 100

 

CREATE COLUMN TABLE "WORD2VECTOR"."WORD_EMBEDDINGS"(
	"ID" INTEGER,
	"WORD" NVARCHAR(40),
	"VECTOR" REAL_VECTOR(100),
	PRIMARY KEY("ID")
)UNLOAD PRIORITY 5 AUTO MERGE;

 

The dataset is a text document prepared from https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-ai-core/sap-ai-core-service-guide/what-is-sap-ai-core.  

Generate word embeddings:

The dataset is trained on Word2Vec model which is designed to work at the word level within local contexts. The file content is preprocessed into passages or chunks before tokenizing them into words. This way we retain the contextual information within each passage while still adhering to the word-level training of Word2Vec. The embeddings learned will still be at the word level, capturing the relationships between words based on their co-occurrence.

We will use the Natural Language Toolkit libraries and Punkt sentence tokenizer for processing the text.

 

import hdbcli
import nltk
import string
import chardet

from gensim.models import Word2Vec
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from hdbcli import dbapi
from nltk.tokenize import sent_tokenize, word_tokenize

# Download the tokenizer from NLTK.
nltk.download('punkt')

 

Define function detect_encoding to read the raw bytes from the file and use chardet.detect to detect the encoding of the file.

 

def detect_encoding(file_path):
    with open(file_path, 'rb') as file:
        raw_data = file.read()
    result = chardet.detect(raw_data)
    return result['encoding']

 

Define function preprocess_text to tokenize the sentence into words and convert words to lowercase and remove punctuations

 

def preprocess_text(sentence):    
    words = word_tokenize(sentence)        
    words = [word.lower() for word in words if word.isalnum()]    
    return words

 

Define function process_file to process the content. The file content is split into sentences using sent_tokenize and each sentence is tokenized into words using word_tokenize. Splitting the file content into smaller units like sentences leads to more accurate and meaningful word embeddings.

 

def process_file(file_path):
    # Detect the file encoding
    encoding = detect_encoding(file_path)
    
    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding=encoding, errors='ignore') as file:
        content = file.read()
    # Split the content into sentences
    sentences = sent_tokenize(content)
    # Tokenize and preprocess each sentence
    tokenized_sentences = [preprocess_text(sentence) for sentence in sentences if isinstance(sentence, str)]

    return tokenized_sentences

 

 Let's start by processing the file content by converting it to lowercase, removing punctuations and tokenize the text by calling function process_file

 

# Path to the file
file_path = "C:/Users/Arun/tensorflow_datasets/Doc/SAPAICore.txt"

# Process the file
tokenized_sentences = process_file(file_path)

 

Next step to generate word embeddings using the Word2Vec model. Word2Vec has 2 algorithms, CBOW(default) and Skip-gram,

  1. Continuous Bag of Words (CBOW): Predicts a target word from the context of surrounding words.
  2. Skip-gram: Predicts the context words from a given target word.

To explicitly choose between CBOW and Skip-gram, you can use the sg parameter, sg=0 for CBOW (default).
sg=1 for Skip-gram.

 

# Train Word2Vec model
model = Word2Vec(tokenized_sentences, vector_size=100, window=5, min_count=1, workers=4)

 

The primary input for Word2Vec is a list of lists of words. Each inner list represents a sentence or a document.

  • tokenized_sentences - sentence used for training the model
  • vector_size - the dimensionality of the word vectors, it is set to 100.
  • window -  the maximum distance between the current and predicted word within a sentence, set to 5.
  • min_count -  ignores all words with a total frequency lower than this, set to 1.
  • workers - the number of worker threads to use for training.

Populate the HANA DB:

Connect to the HANA DB and store the word vectors into table WORD_EMBEDDINGS

 

conn = dbapi.connect(
    address='xxxxxxxxxxxx.hana.trial-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com',
    port='443', 
    user='xxxxxx', 
    password='xxxxxxxx', 
    encrypt=True
    # sslValidateCertificate=True
)
cursor = conn.cursor()
words = list(model.wv.index_to_key)

for idx, word in enumerate(words):    
    vector = model.wv[word]
    vector_str = ','.join(map(str, vector))
    sql_command = '''INSERT INTO "DBADMIN"."EMBEDDINGS" ("ID","WORD","TOKEN") VALUES (?,?,TO_REAL_VECTOR(?))'''
    vector_str = '['+vector_str+']'
    val = (idx,word,vector_str)
    cursor.execute(sql_command,val)

connection.commit()
cursor.close()
connection.close()

 

Let's check the word embeddings in HANA DB. Table WORD_EMBEDDINGS contain 801 unique words with vector of dimension 100

Visualize the Embeddings in TensorBoard:

Next step is to visualize the embeddings in TensorBoard projector. To visualize the vector the embeddings are exported in a TSV file (embeddings.tsv) and the corresponding metadata (tokenized text) is saved in another TSV file (metadata.tsv).

 

import tensorflow as tf
import subprocess

# Create a directory to store TensorBoard logs
log_dir = 'log_Embeddings'
if not os.path.exists(log_dir):
    os.makedirs(log_dir)

# Save embeddings and metadata
with open(os.path.join(log_dir, 'metadata.tsv'), 'w') as metadata_file:
    for word in model.wv.index_to_key:
        metadata_file.write(f"{word}\n")

embedding_matrix = np.array([model.wv[word] for word in model.wv.index_to_key])
np.savetxt(os.path.join(log_dir, 'embeddings.tsv'), embedding_matrix, delimiter='\t')

 

The embeddings are loaded into a TensorFlow variable and saved as a checkpoint(embedding.ckpt).

 

# Create a TensorFlow variable for the embeddings
embedding_var = tf.Variable(embedding_matrix, name='word2vec_embeddings')

# Create a checkpoint to save the embeddings
checkpoint = tf.train.Checkpoint(embedding=embedding_var)
checkpoint.save(os.path.join(log_dir, 'embedding.ckpt'))

 

Embeddings, metadata and checkpoint files will be downloaded at the directory path

The TensorBoard projector is configured to visualize the embeddings. Configure the TensorFlow projector to visualize the embeddings using the metadata file. 

 

# Configure the projector
config = projector.ProjectorConfig()
embedding = config.embeddings.add()
embedding.tensor_name = embedding_var.name
embedding.metadata_path = os.path.join(log_dir, 'metadata.tsv')
projector.visualize_embeddings(log_dir, config)

 

TensorBoard is launched using subprocess to visualize the embeddings and metadata at default port 6006

 

tb_process = subprocess.Popen(["tensorboard", "--logdir", log_dir])
print("Access TensorBoard at http://localhost:6006/")

 

An alternate approach is to launch tensorflow projector and load the TSV file of vectors(embeddings.tsv) and metadata. TensorBoard shows the vector representation of 801 tokens in dimension 100.

Compare Results:

We have come to the final step, we will search for a word in the TensorBoard and in HANA Vector Engine and find its nearest tokens and compare the results. First, let's search the TensorBoard for the word 'dataset' applying Cosine similarity

Let's check the same using Euclidean distance

Now, let's run the same search in HANA Vector Engine using Cosine similarity

Search for word 'dataset' using Euclidean distance

Nearest points like 'alongside','additionally','xusaa','vs','operation' are present in TensorBoard and HANA Vector Engine though there are slight differences seen. This might be because of trivial variations in the implementation of Cosine similarity/Euclidean distance in TensorBoard and SAP HANA DB. For example, numerical precision, handling of zero vectors, or normalization methods could differ.

Conclusion:

In this blog post I've demonstrated how to generate word embeddings using Word2Vec, store these embeddings in SAP HANA DB, visualize them using TensorBoard, and compare the cosine and Euclidean distances of word vectors between SAP HANA Vector Engine and TensorBoard. This process provides valuable insights into the semantic relationships captured by word embeddings and showcases the powerful capabilities of SAP HANA DB and TensorBoard for handling and visualizing vector data.

Note: When importing Word2Vec from gensim you might encounter an error "ImportError: cannot import name 'triu' from 'scipy.linalg". To fix this error open matutils.py (will be stored at \AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\gensim\matutils.py) and import triu from numpy instead of scipy.linalg. 

Regards,

ArunKumar Balakrishnan

entry.title: Re: Unable to open Salesforce Database in Crystal Reports
entry.content: So, we've made progress but now I'm running into another issue. We were able to copy a registry file that included the database connector from my supervisor's machine. That was able to get us past the password part. But now, once it starts to load (at least it appears that it's getting past that) if freezes and says "not responding" and then the application crashes. It doesn't give me a crash report or anything. I installed my software on a different server, had to go through all the hoops again to load the database, same thing, the app ends up not responding and then crashes. Not sure what's going on now...

entry.title: How do I create an API in java
entry.content: I am developing an app using Java as a language and SQLServer as a database so I would like to know if it is possible and how to create an #API to integrate another app like Finance app into my application?

entry.title: Re: SAP Task Center setup for S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
@saurkhare 

On investigation using report SEC_TRACE_ANALYZER , it was concluded that even though the destination was configured with Basic Authentication, the principal propagation flow was getting triggered on S/4HANA using the system certificate from Cloud Connector, resulting in a failing authentication on S/4HANA.

In the cloud connector, unchecking option "System Certificate for Logon" solved the issue. We recommend that you keep this option deactivated, as this lets you use principal propagation and basic authentication over the same access control entry, regardless of the logon order settings in the target system.

entry.title: Re: Migration Public Cloud for Low Value assets
entry.content:
Ensure you visit SSCUI Specify Amounts (102610) to check the amounts. 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/227f0f8f970a44f88d6c1b875971c306.html?locale=en-US

Read the migration protocol on the help guide https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/a185c3d89dae4ffc85723f27f624944a.html?locale=en-US

And do a test run migration on your test system to ensure all data is good. And make sure you migration Group Currency or allow the system to translate it for you.

entry.title: Re: Takeover Values field is greyedout in AS91 tcode for...
entry.content: Check the capitalization date isn't after the legacy transfer date.

entry.title: Credit management with multiple rules
entry.content:
Hi team

On the Preparatory Activity and Migration of Customizing for Credit Management -- Define Settings for Credit Management Migration we have just one Rule for migration, what happened if we have more than 1 rule? how can we migrate customers to BP Credit role with correct rules if we can only select one on the prep steps.

What should I need to take care to perform migration for customers using different rules 

Regards

entry.title: Update Credit Group field
entry.content:
Hi team

Credit group was not updated during conversion to S4 HANA and is showed blank, we need to update it with some mass update. We have tried LSMW, Migration cockpit but is not working

Could you please advise how can we do it?

 

Grace

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
DMEEX - Extended Data Medium Exchange Engine
entry.content:
Una de las herramientas que nos han ayudado mucho en el proceso de pagos para evitar hacer múltiples programas ABAP es el Motor de Intercambio de Datos Extendido

Extended Data Medium Exchange Engine (DMEEX) | SAP Help Portal

 

Esta herramienta nos permite definir cualquier layout de archivo que las instituciones bancarias nos requieren cuando necesitamos hacer la dispersión de pagos por transferencia bancaria a nuestros proveedores, ¡sin la necesidad de programar nada! Estos archivos de salida pueden generarse en formato TXT o XML.

 

Características importantes

  • El preconfigurado de caja de SAP ya trae múltiples formatos de diversos países, así no tendrás que empezar de cero. Toma uno parecido, cópialo y edítalo. (transacción DMEEX)
  • Puedes poner breakpoints o tracepoints para debuguear como se hace la generación del archivo DMEEX. (The DMEEX Trace Tool - SAP Community)

 

Formatos típicos

Usualmente aquí en México las instituciones bancarias manejan diversos formatos como:

  • Transferencias mismo banco terceros
  • Transferencias otros bancos (SPEI)
  • Transferencias con convenio CIE
  • Transferencias al extranjero

 

La plataforma Bancomer NET Cash es uno de los bancos que manejan estas opciones, entre otros en México.

Implementación o configuración

Ahora, ¿cómo hacemos la configuración de uno de estos formatos?

Primero revisa el requerimiento del banco y mapea cada campo requerido al campo que le corresponde de SAP. Dentro de la configuración del DMEEX puedes ver las tablas y campos disponibles para que puedas ir tomándolos de ahí.

 

Ya que tengas toda esta definición solo es ir acomodando los campos en el orden de salida requeridos y la longitud indicada de cada campo.

Ejemplo

 

 

Opciones en el mapeo de campos

Afortunadamente la herramienta cuenta con diversas formas de mapear campos, no todos tienen que venir de un campo que exista en una de las tablas disponibles del programa de pagos, también puedes poner datos fijos, puedes definir llenar un campo si cumple con ciertas condiciones, o bien si ya de plano no se encuentra el dato puedes agregar código ABAP para completar el requerimiento.

 

No necesitas crear vías de pago para cada tipo de archivo de salida, solo considera que condiciones se deben cumplir para determinar que es un pago a un mismo banco, o a un banco tercero o a un banco extranjero o un convenio CIE, etc. Puedes hacer las definiciones adecuadas para que el DMEE "piense" y decida que layout formar de salida.

 

Ejemplos

En las imágenes puedes ver estos ejemplos:

  1. Puedes ver las condiciones para determinar que la salida es un pago a tercero con cuenta Bancomer.
    1. La condición dice que si el banco destino es Bancomer (FPAYH-ZBNKY='012') y si no trae referencia CIE (FPAYP-STRFR='')

2. Puedes ver la determinación de un campo fijo, ahí se indica la longitud del campo y el valor constante que va a tomar. El campo es CVEOPE, con una longitud de 3 y con valor constante de "PTC"

3. Puedes ver la determinación de un campo en función de una tabla, también el formato de salida del campo, por ejemplo, para el campo Cuenta cargo dice C0 - significa alineado a la derecha rellenado con ceros a la izquierda y su fuente es FPAYHX-UBKNT.

4. Si tu archivo de salida tiene una línea cabecera y otra de detalle, esto lo puedes hacer con el uso de los niveles. En cada nivel correspondiente vas poniendo los campos que se utilizan ahí, y también indicas como saber cuál es el nivel detalle, por ejemplo, en la imagen se ve que el detalle es el nivel 3 y se genera un registro en la salida como detalla por cada documento contable de pago generado. FPAYH-DOC1R.

 

Finalmente

Finalmente te comento que la aplicación fiori donde puedes descargar el archivo luego de ejecutar y contabilizar el programa de pagos se llama Gestionar medios de pago. Al ingresar a esta aplicación puedes colocar los parámetros de filtro que son la sociedad, la fecha de ejecución y el identificador de ejecución de la propuesta de pagos, tal como se ve en la imagen anexa, podrás ver la ejecución realizada lista para seleccionarla y solo darle click en Descargar. En esa lista puedes ver también el nombre del formato de salida creado en el DMEEX.

 

 

Espero te sirva esta información para que puedas hacer uso de esta importante herramienta y maximices el uso de SAP.

 

"El éxito es la suma de pequeños esfuerzos repetidos, un día sí y al otro también" - Robert Collier

entry.title: Re: Depreciation below zero
entry.content:
I think you could only achieve this by posting depreciation manually. 

What is the business rationale for NBV to be less than zero?

entry.title: Re: Asset Depreciation value changed in the middle of the...
entry.content:
Is there more than one phase in the depreciation key?
Was there subsequent transaction posted to the asset? 

You should check the depreciation calculation in the asset master data. AW01N for OP, of Manage Fixed Assets for S/4Hana Cloud.

entry.title: certification check for an operation activity in Order pod (assigning to phase)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Is there any possibility to assign "certification check" to an operation activity in order pod (assigning certification to a phase).

Thanks in advance,

regards,

Anvesh

I tried to create a webi report out of a HANA CALC view with input parameter selection from a infoObject table. When I tried to select the member/refresh values, I encountered the error. Has anyone encountered the same error before and how was it fixed? Also tried in AO, no members available.

Hi Experts,

There a possibility to connect a local SAPRouter to a S/4 HANA system on RISE? We need to reach that system for the integration with a Payroll System.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Sustainability Control Tower – Uploading and showing Data in Fiori Tiles– System Setup
entry.content: Sustainability Metrics catalog is no longer in SCT, I see two apps "Manage metrics" and "Manage ESG Data". Can you please elaborate on the process to upload GHG data? I am using "Manage ESG data" to upload "Injury" data and getting the following error,

entry.title: Re: CBTA using dynamic date parameter input #solman
entry.content:
I have a question I hope someone can help me with:

Why is the token/code returning the date format DDMMYYYY without the zero before the single digit month; for example, instead of returning 06/13/2024 it's returning 6/13/2024?

Here are the details of this issue:

  1. The CBTA script extracts data from SAP, creates a file and sends the resulting file to an AL11 directory.
  2. The script navigates to the directory path, sorts the files in descending order such that the current date displays on the top row.
  3. Then the date is captured with checkproperty (a parameter) and compared to today's date, which is picked up as it is displayed on screen (format MMDDYYYY) as expected.
  4. However, when the parameter is compared to today's date using any of the three methods listed in item 5 below; the date does not include the zero before the month, where month is June for instance.  For example, Jun is is returned as 6/13/2024 (format MDDYYYY) instead of 06/13/2024.  Therefore, the script fails with the following error:     

      Target: GridCell_0_MOD_DATE
     - The 'GetCellValue(0, "MOD_DATE")' property is set to: 06/13/2024
      - It has been compared to: 6/13/2024
     - Using the operator: =

 

    5. Received the same error using any/all of the 3 items below:

  • %today%
  • %=month(now())&"/"&day(now())+1&"/"&year(now())%
  • %=Month($today$)%/%=Day($today$)%/%=Year($today$)%

Thank you,

Jeannine

entry.title: Payroll connection to S/4HANA RISE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a EC Payroll System and a S/4HANA system on RISE we want to connect and integrate both systems but because the S/4 HANA is a private system the RFC connections to that system doesnt work for remote systems so how we can connect the systems between? The S/4 can reach the payroll system by a SAPRouter but the EC Payroll cant reach the S/4 System. We can create a SR to open the connection to RISE? Or maybe we need another way to success the connection?

Thanks

entry.title: calculation in final internal table in amdp class
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a AMDP class where the final itab is a join of several itabs.

I wrote this code initially as normal abap report and since the execution time was much longer I am approaching it as AMDP class.

 

How can I write this in my amdp select

entry.title: Basic auth in API Manager: client + user
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to set up the basic authentication in the API Management. I need it to check both the username&password + the cliend_id&client_secret passed on by the caller. If the user or the client_id is missing, the auth must fail. I managed to get them work but not together.

How is this possible to achieve in the API Management?

Cristian

entry.title: Mass update of Credit Group Field
entry.content:
All- Please we need advise on the best approach to update the Credit field(Credit Group) in S/4 HANA below.  Any help you can offer will be greatly appreciated. We have tried the following mass update transaction, but none of it works for the Credit Group

Transactions

UKM_MASSDATA_UPDATE

UKM_MASS_UPD1 for Mass Change to External Credit Info.
UKM_MASS_UPD2 for Mass Change to Score

UKM_MASS_UPD3 for Mass Change to Credit Limit
UKM_MASS_UPD4 for Mass Change to Check Rule
UKM_MASS_UPD5 for Assigning UKM000 Role

 

 

 

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Jobs running by FFID
entry.content: Dear all, Any advice on this on how to achieve?

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 2 - Words as Ve
entry.content:
Hi Vitaliy, all worked fine, also with using 500000 words, also interesting: showing more than LIMIT 1 results.

A little bit stranger:

word1='Munich'

related_word1='Oktoberfest'

word2='Stuttgart'

(It is not "Septemberfest", but "Cannstatter Wwasen" - but it usually takes playe in september)


Experimenting with capitals worked for Brasil, Braslilia -> Australia, Canberra, but not for Suisse, Bern.

entry.title: 4RF - Project Control - Resourcing and Procurement in relation to/with Q stock in STO's
entry.content:
Our question is: can we  move Special Stock Q from one Plant/Company Code to another Plant/Company Code?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: 4RF - Project Control - Resourcing and Procurement in...
entry.content:
Yes, its possible to create an STO / Delivery with account assignment to a WBS Element. Where you can transfer from a WBS Element in plant A to the same WBS Element in Plant B via the STO process. (Currently it is only possible to provide one WBS element in STO)

When the STO is created they enter the WBS. The Outbound Delivery is created for the same WBS. They post the 641Q and the 101Q and both refer to the same WBS Element

KBA 2628973 - Stock Transport Order between different Sales Orders / WBS Elements.

If you want an issuing from one wbs and then receive into a second WBS Element (2 separate wbs elements)

Since the WBS Element needs to be specified in the Stock Transport Order and we only have 1 field for a single WBS Element, it is not possible to specify an issuing WBS Element different than a receiving WBS Element. We just move the stock of the project assigned to the WBS Element between two plants.

A workaround could be to use 'Post Goods Movement' (MIGO) here it is possible to make a transfer posting with the movement type 415 Q from here you can then specify two different WBS Elements in the transfer. However the 415Q posting is not part of the STO / Delivery process – its completely separate so as a result there is no Billing Documents / Invoicing for the 415Q posting.

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content: @thayumanavanThanks for the feedback. I implemented an additional model and changed the import to this. While designing the cross model copy rules it seems that also here hierarchy nodes are not allowed. Do I miss any general setting?

entry.title: How to define accounts for COGS?
entry.content:
We would like to know how to check/define the accounts used for splitting the costs of good sold.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to define accounts for COGS?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


A cost splitting profile is predelivered by SAP and can be adapted to your requirements using the configuration activity Define Accounts for Splitting the Cost of Goods Sold. Only if the source and target accounts are defined can a COGS split take place. For more information, see the respective configuration help in your system and the following product assistance:

  • Splitting the Cost of Goods Sold

  • Manage COGS Splits

  • Reposting COGS Split

Furthermore, you can also refer to the below Blog Post for details:

Efficiently Splitting the Cost of Goods Sold with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Cloud


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Getting clear with SAP Integration Suite Content Modifier
entry.content: Thank You Very Much Alexander, I have followed all the steps and this is working for me and well explained every point.

entry.title: Re: Unable to open Salesforce Database in Crystal Reports
entry.content:
The problem with just copying registrry keys is CR doesn't support manually copying files and keys around, you must use the installer to get it done properly. Ask your user where it works how they installed the client. CR is looking for more keys or dll's etc. which is why it's hanging.

Check the PC where it's working in Programs and Features, you should see CR installed and possibly other Clients, both should be the same.

Download a tool called Process Monitor from Microsoft and compare file when logging on, you will like find a lot of keys and other dll's are missing. And check out the KBA I posted previously on debugging connnection issues.

entry.title: Re: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery...
entry.content: Dear Vera, many thanks for your very quick answer. I have tried to review the log file /usr/sap/hostctrl/work/outsidediscovery.log . It was quite big - around 200 KB. On the first glance it didn't contain any error. I went on to check the SLD, but the system wasn't there 😞 I decided to delete the log file, in order to start fresh. Then I have executed the command you advised and when I try to review the log file /usr/sap/hostctrl/work/outsidediscovery.log, the system says that it doesn't exist. Please kindly let me know how to immediately trigger the discovery process - I already asked that question in my first post. Many thanks 🙂

entry.title: CBTA date format issue: Why is the &today& token and other vbscript returning 06/13/2024 as 6/13/20?
entry.content:
I have a question I hope someone can help me with:

CBTA date format issue: Why is the token/vbscript returning the date format as DMMYYYY without the zero before the single digit month; for example, instead of returning 06/13/2024 it's returning 6/13/2024?

Here are the details of this issue:

The CBTA script extracts data from SAP, creates a file and sends the resulting file to an AL11 directory.
The script navigates to the directory path, sorts the files in descending order such that the current date displays on the top row.
Then the date is captured with checkproperty (a parameter) and compared to today's date, which is picked up as it is displayed on screen (format MMDDYYYY) as expected.
However, when the parameter is compared to today's date using any of the three methods listed in item 5 below; the date does not include the zero before the month, where month is June for instance. For example, Jun is returned as 6/13/2024 (format MDDYYYY) instead of 06/13/2024. Therefore, the script fails with the following error:
Target: GridCell_0_MOD_DATE
- The 'GetCellValue(0, "MOD_DATE")' property is set to: 06/13/2024
- It has been compared to: 6/13/2024
- Using the operator: =

5. Received the same error using any/all of the 3 items below:

%today%
%=month(now())&"/"&day(now())+1&"/"&year(now())%
%=Month($today$)%/%=Day($today$)%/%=Year($today$)%

Thank you,

Jeannine

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Saurabh @Saurabh_Kabra , Hi Anupam @ADR ,

1. Will be available in free tier.

2. 100 events = 1 IS msg

Best,

Karsten

entry.title: Are we charged for enabling "Cloud Foundary" for enabling "Process Integration runtime"
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to use the Service Instance and Service Key for Inbound Authentication for Cloud Integration's i-flow by enabling the "Process Integration Runtime." To enable "Process Integration Runtime," we need to enable "Cloud Foundry" in our subaccount. I would like to know if there are any charges associated with enabling "Cloud Foundry" in the subaccount. If there are, how much does it cost?

Regards,
Ravi

entry.title: Re: Error: Authentication kind "jwt" configured, but no X...
entry.content: Hi, I was following a SAP Tutorial, and found same error, I just changed the authenticate property in the file "package.json", under "cds", you will need to change the value "xsuaa" to "mocked", hope it works, it did it for me.

entry.title: Re: Fixed issues documentation for CR 13SP36
entry.content:
I pinged the Product team to update the page info:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

I suspect it should be there sometime this week...

Thanks for pointing it out.

entry.title: Re: JSON model loading after the view is rendered, thus l...
entry.content:
jsonmodel.setData

or

jsonmodel.refresh(true)

either of them should make your view updated.

entry.title: Re: How much does the "Process Integration Runtime" BTP service plan cost?
entry.content: @Sriprasadsbhat  I want to use the Service Instance and Service Key for Inbound Authentication for Cloud Integration's i-flow by enabling the "Process Integration Runtime." To enable "Process Integration Runtime," we need to enable "Cloud Foundry" in our subaccount. I would like to know if there are any charges associated with enabling "Cloud Foundry" in the subaccount. If there are, how much does it cost?

entry.title: Approval Process flow as a diagram in pop-up in SAP RAP list report
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Request your suggestions and help in bringing Approval process flow of a sales order in SAP RAP application within a pop up, when I click status field (for example, can be any specific field) in list page (not in object page as separate tab). Tried to refer SAP standard Applications R_SalesOrderTP and C_SalesOrderManage but could not find meta data extension for those and how to bring in process flow. I would like to have exactly like below but inside a pop-up screen. Please provide me with some examples where I can refer and complete my requirement. 

Thanks in Advance,

KrpSagar

entry.title: Re: print option windows 2019 using Crystal report versio...
entry.content:
Crystal Reports requires access to the printer driver you want to use. It searches the registry for the printers installed, liklye cause is the printer doesn't exist under that users profile.

So what you need to do is install the printer on each Users TS instance.

I believe this is a variation of Microsoft's Easy Print, it doesn't have the Printer installed and uses a printer installed on the Server and shows up on the PC's as a Redirected Printer. CR doesn't support that Printer client either.

Crystal uses the old DEVMODE structure to access printer driver values, if it doesn't exist CR will default to the Users Default Printer, which it looks like it's doing.

I suggest contacting your RDS Network Admin and get them to install the Printer on each Users Profile so CR can access the info and communicate with the Printer.

entry.title: Re: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery...
entry.content:
P. S.: I have executed the following command:

# /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostctrl -function ExecuteOutsideDiscovery -sldreg

Everywhere I see success. At the end of the output there is:

OD_ComputerSystem_<hostname>.xml] , string , OK
OD_Database_<hostname>_<SID>_<SID>_ORA.xml] , string , OK
OD_HostAgent.xml] , string , OK

So, it registers the computer system, the database and the HostAgent. And I can see those entries in the SLD!
But I can't see the Java technical system. So perhaps Outside Discovery isn't doing what I need and this is
not the right approach for my situation ? Or is there indeed a way to make it also send information about the
technical system ? Please advise! Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Brazil - Intercompany (OBYA) configuration in S4 Cloud
entry.content: Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery...
entry.content: The following URL: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/c413647f87a54db59d18cb074ce3dafd/0e08c84de63e43ec938a92be699931f8.html?version=7.2.12 says that Application Server Java technical systems can only be defined by SLD data suppliers. Please kindly let me know the way how a Java system can send system data to multiple Solution Managers (either SLD or LMDB, it does not matter which). Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Multiple SLD Targets on a AS JAVA System
entry.content: Hello, this does not work for me. Outside Discovery only registers the computer system, the database and the HostAgent. How can I register the technical systems ? Because the other stuff is there, but when I click on AS Java technical systems, I do NOT see the AS Java technical system in question 😞

entry.title: How do you rearrange columns and change column width in ME2N please?
entry.content: Hello.  I wish to change my ME2N layout, move columns around and change column widths.  How do I do that?  Many thanks.

entry.title: Transaction code KALC is not appearing in zeros
entry.content:
Hi, when I execute t-code KALC I am finding some document number that are not been cleared, for that reason the amount in my account is not zero, It works correctly some month ago....

I checked and all the FICO reconciliation ledger configuration is correct.

KALA- activate recon ledger

OBYN - Clearing account

Transaction GA0 and CO1 configured

OKKP- Has reconc ledger active

Do you have any idea why could be this difference?

entry.title: Tablas de referencias cruzadas con Crystal Report
entry.content:
Hola

Tengo una consulta, tengo un campo parámetro definido como fila en mi tabla de referencias cruzadas, pero quiero que ese valor sea opcional que me lo agrupe.

¿Hay alguna manera en que si ese parámetro no tiene algún valor la tabla de referencias cruzadas no lo agrupe?

entry.title: Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We are implementing Brazil (NF-e / NFS-e) on S/4HANA Public Cloud and are facing some difficulties about the following configurations:

  • Assign Nota Fiscal Type to Sales Document Types (S_ALR_87007608)
  • NF relevant Item Categories (S_ALR_87007627)
  • NF Relevance (Billing Types) (S_ALR_87007624)

We know that these t-codes above do not work in Public Cloud solution and included them just for reference. ‌‌😉

We can't create new sales documents as well.

We searched the SSCUIs documentation but did not find any related IDs to these items.

How to define the types of NFe related to the respective sales documents, Billing, Item categories in Public Cloud and link them? ‌‌🤔

Should we implement only through Badis? ‌‌🤔

Thanks. 🙂

Fabio Spulveda

entry.title: Error (Must Delete)
Error
Re: Are we charged for enabling "Cloud Foundary" for enab...
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

This depends on the type of BTP account/subaccount you have. There is a free tier plan available for Cloud Foundry Runtime which can be used for testing/trial purposes even within Enterprise accounts. For more information, please see below links:

SAP Discovery Center Service - Cloud Foundry Runtime

Using Free Service Plans | SAP Help Portal

Thanks,

Kishan

entry.title: Re: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery...
entry.content: Dear Customer,

entry.title: Re: Please kindly help me to configure outside discovery...
entry.content: Dear Customer, the JAVA system is sent via the /nwa application. I suggest you the following guided answer for different data suppliers in SAP Solution Manager and Focused Run: 3232202 - Guided Answer for Troubleshooting for missing or outdated LMDB data suppliers: 3232202 - Guided Answer for Troubleshooting for missing or outdated LMDB data suppliers in SAP Solution Manager and SAP Focused Run

entry.title: Re: Tablas de referencias cruzadas con Crystal Report
entry.content:
Create two versions of the CrossTab and place them in two different sections. For example, RFa and RFb.
Us the suppress expression of each of these section to show only the version you want to see based on the parameter value.

entry.title: Re: calculation in final internal table in amdp class
entry.content:
Hi @winona86 

Curious to ask you but from the code snippet shared, it can be done in a CDS easily, without needing to do an AMDP class.

Regards

RG

entry.title: Re: Basic auth in API Manager: client + user
entry.content:
Hi Cristian,

This may not be possible via the standard scenario configuration. Please check this thread SAP API Management - Two authentication options fo... - SAP Community which discusses a similar requirement. You might need to build custom logic to check for both username and client_id field values during authentication.

Thanks,

Kishan

entry.title: Advance compliance reporting OutPut is data not Displayed
entry.content:
Hello to Mexico Solution with SAP ACR the Run Compliance Report is Executed in Development and Qas System Fine but in Production System the output with View Fortma Element is not working

 

 

The OutPut in PDF is Cutted 

In Development or Testing Enviroment show the Amounts even if the amount is 0.00 but in production the amounts are no Showed, there is the option Edit in the screen and the element let change de amounts, this option no display the elements to change the values.

Maybe some installation in Production is missing, Any Ideas?..

 

Regards and Thanks for your Support.

entry.title: Re: Payroll connection to S/4HANA RISE
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Router is offered as a managed service even for your S/4HANA system in RISE. The same approach (SAP Router based connectivity) is possible for EC Payroll to connect to S/4HANA RISE - both are ABAP systems technically. You should perhaps check with your RISE contacts (TSM/CDM) to open connectivity from ECP to S/4HANA RISE.

Thanks,

Kishan

entry.title: Re: SAPRouter connection for RISE
entry.content:
Hi,

This seems to be a duplicate of https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/payroll-connection-to-s-4hana-rise/qaq-p/13733716.

You may want to close one of these.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, I'm Luis Burd, an industrial engineer specializing in project management.

I identify as a person in the below category:

    • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 

Since arriving in the US, my passion for project management has been a driving force in my career. I'm excited about joining the digital skills initiative to learn SAP, which plays a crucial role in modern project management. Mastering SAP will not only enhance my skills but also make me a more competitive professional. I'm eager to seize this opportunity to expand my knowledge and apply SAP tools effectively in real-world projects.

entry.title: Re: Export "Cutomer : Ctry-Spec.Enh." tab data of custome...

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/74db242020e848ddb64014d54979b8e0.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: BuildApps SAP AppGyver classic Data Entities for Firebase Failing (Help :) )
entry.content:
Hi,

I am too experiencing same issue. "Save Data Entity" is disabled for me in SAP Build Apps. Any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Where to feed serial no. during PGI in ME2O
entry.content:
Hi,

Old OSS note 63409 says that adding serial number is not supported in ME2O. I could not find find other OSS note that is more recent with a solution for this.

Link: https://me.sap.com/notes/63409/E

In my company, we use t-code Adsubcon with Delivery creation and I am trying now to enable GI without delivery too for serialized materials.

Good luck!

entry.title: Can not deploy Fiori project to BTP ABAP environment .
entry.content:
Hi, SAP UI5 Expert, I create a fiori element project in BAS and everything are ok. The sap ui5 version is 1.120.12 . When I deploy it into BTP ABAP environment. Error shows as the following: ✔ Start deployment (Y/n)? … yes info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Creating archive with UI5 build result. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Archive created. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Starting to deploy. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 ZFREIGHTORDER2 found on target system: true info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 SAPUI5 application ZFREIGHTORDER2 was uploaded or registered with warnings info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 ***** Upload of SAPUI5 App or Library from ZIP-Archive into SAPUI5 ABAP Repository ***** info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Running in regular mode, brief log info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 15 Files found in Archive. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Parameters * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Operation parameters may have been adjusted. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The name of the SAPUI5 repository "ZFREIGHTORDER2" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The binary files are identified using the standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The text files are identified using the standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The files and folders to be ignored are determined from the built-in standard settings. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The description of the SAPUI5 repository has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Transport Request "H02K900024" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The external Code Page Name "UTF8" has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The acceptance of Unix style end of line markers in text files has been determined from the corresponding import parameter. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Unix style end of line markers in text files get accepted. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 The delta mode has been turned on. info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Running in safe mode info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Updating existing SAPUI5 ABAP repository ZFREIGHTORDER2 info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Updating the Application Index * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Messages from its application log: info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Writing descriptor apps/freightordermgt2/app/sap/zfreightorder2/ info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Updated UIADs for UI5 Repository ZFREIGHTORDER2, package ZFREIGHT_ORDER_EVENT_PACKAGE, transport H02K900024 warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 App descriptor of type 'application' does not define a launchable inbound warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 No UIAD was created as no inbound is defined in manifest.json info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 For details see the application log (SLG1) in client 000 for object /UI5/APPIDX . info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 A BAdI implementation for /UI5/BADI_REPOSITORY_LOAD is active: Final activities may have been performed. warn abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 SAPUI5 application ZFREIGHTORDER2 was uploaded or registered with warnings info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 * Done * info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 App available at https://ad7f109a-dfc3-490b-9539-669f3cbf0578.abap-web.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/zfreightorder2 info abap-deploy-task ZFREIGHTORDER2 Deployment Successful. node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:265 throw new ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND( ^ Error [ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND]: Cannot find module '/home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm/index.js' imported from /home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/rimraf/dist/esm/index.js at finalizeResolution (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:265:11) at moduleResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:933:10) at defaultResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/resolve:1157:11) at ModuleLoader.defaultResolve (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:390:12) at ModuleLoader.resolve (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:359:25) at ModuleLoader.getModuleJob (node:internal/modules/esm/loader:234:38) at ModuleWrap. (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:87:39) at link (node:internal/modules/esm/module_job:86:36) { code: 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND', url: 'file:///home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm/index.js' }

I checked the folder home/user/projects/freightordermgt2/node_modules/glob/dist/esm, the index.js not exists, even I copied index.js from another project, the issue is the same .

Would you please let me know how to resolve this issue ?

 

Best regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: KuCoin-Empfehlungscode für 2024: rMN4U8Y
entry.content: Der neueste KuCoin-Empfehlungscode für 2024 lautet „rMN4U8Y“. Mit diesem Code erhalten Sie 40 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren und eine exklusive Werbeprämie von bis zu 700 USDT für neue Benutzer. ### Vorteile der Verwendung des KuCoin-Empfehlungscodes - **Anmeldebonus**: Erhalten Sie bis zu 700 USDT als Belohnung, indem Sie bei der Registrierung den Code rMN4U8Y verwenden. - **Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren**: Genießen Sie 40 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren. - **Empfehlungsverdienst**: Verdienen Sie bis zu 40 % Provision auf Handelsgebühren von Freunden, die Sie einladen.Der neueste KuCoin-Empfehlungscode für 2024 lautet „rMN4U8Y“. Mit diesem Code erhalten Sie 40 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren und eine exklusive Werbeprämie von bis zu 700 USDT für neue Benutzer. ### Vorteile der Verwendung des KuCoin-Empfehlungscodes - **Anmeldebonus**: Erhalten Sie bis zu 700 USDT als Belohnung, indem Sie bei der Registrierung den Code rMN4U8Y verwenden. - **Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren**: Genießen Sie 40 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren. - **Empfehlungsverdienst**: Verdienen Sie bis zu 40 % Provision auf Handelsgebühren von Freunden, die Sie einladen.

entry.title: Sustainability Control Tower latest
entry.content:
Per the latest update in sustainability control tower i see a tile named "CPE Process Templates for Data Management", I want to use this feature to upload "Injury" data. 

Used the "Actual New Records based on Data in DPI" process which has the 6 steps needed to upload data. 

However, in the "Import & Excel" section i see the upload button is greyed out as shown below. Has anyone faced this issue?

Is there any other way of uploading new data in SCT? I am aware of the "Manage Master Data" tile which is used to upload master data.

Whats the purpose for "Manage ESG Data" ?  I tried uploading a file for the measure  "INJ_INJURED_PERSON"

entry.title: Re: Can not deploy Fiori project to BTP ABAP environment .
entry.content: I changed the version of RIMRAF from 5.07 to 5.05 and the issue gone. So it is a issue of rimraf@5.07 . But another issue happens in BTP abap environment.

entry.title: Re: Explore cost-efficiently the latest SAP S/4HANA Build with Guided Beta SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02
entry.content:
Hi Necla,

This looks quite interesting, albeit I'm not sure how it actually would work in practice - I tried to look at the presentation but it appears to be not accessible (even using my S-ID):

Response is "It looks that you do not have access to the requested resource."

Thanks,

Matt

entry.title: Re: Delivery setup indicator for previous year PURCHASE O...
entry.content:
Dear Jerrysam,

I hope you are doing well.

It is indeed possible to mark the delivery complete indicator even if over delivery tolerance is maintained. If you are encountering issues in doing so, please let me know, and I will be happy to assist.

Additionally, please check message type M7433, which will trigger and prevent the creation of a Goods Receipt if it is marked as "E".

Thank you, and I am here to support you.

entry.title: Is it possible to create a form that allows participants to input content?
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a form that allows participants to input content?

We need to create a form that allows below order:

A: Initiate blank form > B: Fill in required fields > C: Approve.

However, C is not standard role therefore performance form is not applicable. The current MDF workflow in EC does not allow A to initiate blank form, and B has to click [Update] button in workflow page to input. There's no way for A to just initiate a blank form and for B to input without clicking [Update].

This post is to discuss if there's any possibility to allow A to initiate a blank form then B fill in required fields in SF product? Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Thank you for reply. 

 

Then,

only changes in SE16N DEBUG are recorded,

and changes in SE11 DEBUG are not recorded....

entry.title: Re: Download path of Payment Media in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Henrike,

Thank you for answering this!

In this Q&A, I am asking the download file path (= the location where payment media is downloaded).

Which part of the document you shared mentions the download file path?

regards,

Tomoyoshi

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was cancelled"
entry.content:
Hi Rajmungarwadi,

The "CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB" error is a problem with the number range assignments or availability. Checking the relevant number range is a good first step in troubleshooting this issue.

It's advisable to check the number range for material documents.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Register Now – Q3 Onboarding User Group Meeting – Sept 18th
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please Register Here to receive the event invite and login details.

Q3 Onboarding User Group Meeting

Wednesday, September 18th – 11:00 am - 12:30 pm Eastern

REGISTER NOW!

Our Onboarding User Group is customer led by Flynn Group of Companies, JM Huber Corporation and Rogers Corporation. This meeting will provide you with an opportunity to connect with peer Onboarding customers, submit questions to chat with others about, hear from Onboarding experts and listen to a Customer Spotlight.

If you haven’t already, please subscribe to the Customer Empowerment Events Newsletter HERE!  It’s a great resource to stay up to date on all User Group sessions globally.  Also, please check out the User Group Calendar HERE!

Any questions about this meeting, please reach out to Lindsay Westra, Director, User Engagement, SAP SuccessFactors at lindsay.westra@sap.com.  Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Is there any flag to find unverified and verified pho...
entry.content:
Hi @grohitg238 

You may check the isVerified, verifiedTimestamp, verified fields on the customer profile to see if the phone number is verified or not. 

Please see the below screenshot taken from the Identity Query Tool in the Console.

entry.title: Re: Creating a personal development environment #1 - Why Neovim?
entry.content: Why Neovim and not just Vim?

entry.title: Re: Steps to access Azure Blob Storage via REST API from SAP CPI using Azure Storage Adapter and SAP
entry.content:
Hello Dharam,

Can you please provide steps with snapshot on how to access Azure Blob using HTTP adapter? What method to use to post file in Blob? Currently, I am following the steps mentioned by you for HTTP adapter, but it errors out stating "405 

UnsupportedHttpVerb" while posting files.
 
Regards,
Amrita

entry.title: Re: BP - Vendor - have multiple addresses
entry.content:
Hi  Dear,

We had the same business requirement . Please find the solution 

To set up partner determination for delivery in SAP, follow these steps:

  1. Go to IMG (Implementation Guide) > Sales and Distribution > Basic Functions > Partner Determination > Set up Partner Determination > Set Up Partner Determination for Delivery.
  2. Select El in partner determination procedure and click on partner function.
  3. Here, you can add a new partner function, such as Goods Supplier (GS), to allow different pick-up addresses in the inbound delivery/shipment.

Defining Account Groups for Vendors:

  1. Go to IMG > Financial Accounting > Accounts Receivables and Accounts Payable > Master Data > Define Account Groups with Screen Layout (Vendors).
  2. Create a new vendor account group specifically for Goods Suppliers, as only an address is required for these vendors.

Creating Number Ranges for Vendor Accounts:

  1. Go to IMG > Financial Accounting > Accounts Receivables and Accounts Payable > Master Data > Preparations for Creating Supplier Master Data > Create Number Ranges for Vendor Accounts & Assign Number Ranges to Vendor Account Groups.
  2. Create a new number range for the Goods Supplier account group and assign it to that group.

Defining Business Partner Roles:

  1. Go to IMG > Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner > Basic Settings > Business Partner Roles > Define BP Roles.
  2. Create a new role specific for Goods Suppliers, such as ZFLVN0 (by copying the standard FLVN01 role).

Defining Number Ranges for Business Partners:

  1. Go to IMG > Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner > Basic Settings > Number Ranges and Groupings > Define Number Range & Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges.
  2. Define a new number range for the Goods Supplier business partner role (ZFLVN0) and assign it to that role.

Configuring Field Attributes per Business Partner Role:

  1. Go to IMG > Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner > Basic Settings > Field Groupings > Configure Field Attributes per BP Role > Configure Field Attributes for Each Role Category (0001-3500).
  2. Configure which fields are mandatory for the Goods Supplier role category. For example, set City and Country as mandatory fields for Goods Suppliers.

By following these steps, you can set up the necessary configurations in SAP to handle Goods Suppliers as a separate partner function, account group, and business partner role, with specific number ranges and field requirements.
